name: Twins duo
description:
“Don’t you feel like severing..?“

twins duo bot inspired by Evelyn Evelyn, Wilbur starts looking for love soon getting a crush on a girl in his school, Sally, though techno feels left behind since he can’t and doesn’t want to find a relationship.

You can choose to be either twin or be a different character (I think)

this bot was first made on my c.ai account, ezrapooks and I just remade it onto here for @Melskisis
